item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n15","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"Negative control expected direct execution: the prompt describes three valid convergence iterations with improving attendance metrics and asks for the next reminder-timing optimization. The assistant instead opens with a brake/triage warning, frames the request as repeated local repair, restricts the timing change to a one-time emergency, and says not to directly do a fifth reminder optimization. Although it provides some tactics, it false-fires triage and blocks the valid next-step optimization path."}
